summary: Custom logo tape measure for private-label tool programs, with OEM brand label, metric/imperial blade, shell color matching, barcode, and retail packaging support.
targetBuyers: Private-label tool brands, promotional product buyers, hardware importers, distributors, and retail program managers
sellingPoints: Logo label or printing support for private-label tape measure brands
Metric, inch, or dual-unit blade options for different markets
Color box, blister card, barcode label, display box and carton mark support

specs.label: Material
specs.value: High-carbon steel tape, ABS shell, nylon lanyard, stainless steel hook, belt clip

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Logo label or printing, Pantone shell color, blade printing, hook, belt clip, lanyard, barcode, carton mark, and private-label packaging

specs.label: Packaging
specs.value: OPP bag, color box, blister card, display box, export carton, buyer barcode, and carton mark

specs.label: MOQ
specs.value: Flexible MOQ, to be confirmed by order details

specs.label: Lead time
specs.value: Custom logo samples ready in about 3 days. Bulk lead time can be negotiated based on order quantity and packaging requirements.

title: Custom Logo Tape Measure
quality: Logo position, color matching, and print appearance check
Metric/imperial blade marking readability and coating review
Brake, hook rivet, retraction, belt clip, and lanyard function testing
Packaging artwork, barcode label, carton mark, and pre-shipment quantity review
